title: Discovered Topic
description: A topic discovered during /viral:discover, scored against the creator's ICP using 4 weighted criteria.

description.description: Brief description of the topic and why it's trending

engagement_signals.description: What engagement made this stand out (e.g., 500 upvotes, trending)

scoring.description: 4-criteria scoring per content-pipeline.md framework. Each 1-10, weighted by learning_weights.

icp_relevance.description: Does this matter to the creator's ideal audience?

timeliness.description: Is this happening now? Early coverage beats late coverage.

content_gap.description: Is the topic saturated or is there room for a fresh take?

proof_potential.description: Can you show something on screen, or is this just opinion?

weighted_total.description: Total after applying learning_weights from agent brain

ccn_fit.description: Core/Casual/New audience fit — must hit 2 of 3 to be saved

core.description: Does this solve a $5K+ problem? (checked against icp.pain_points)

new_audience.description: Could a stranger with zero context understand the hook?

pass.description: True if 2+ of core/casual/new_audience are true

pillars.description: Which content pillars this topic maps to

competitor_coverage.description: How competitors have covered this topic (if at all)
